overview: An all-in-one e-commerce marketplace combining general shopping (like Flipkart) and quick-commerce/grocery delivery (like Zepto). Buyers can browse products, add to cart, checkout, and track orders. Sellers can list products, manage inventory, and fulfill orders — all in one platform.
features: Product catalog with search, filters, and category browsing
Shopping cart with persistent sessions and full checkout flow
Seller dashboard for product and order management with image uploads
Buyer order history with status tracking and reorder
Role-based access for Buyers and Sellers
Indian UX — Rupee pricing, local address fields, familiar categories
